SettingsWindow.title: Bandori Desktop Pet - Settings
SettingsWindow.band_subtitle: Choose a band first, then choose a character
SettingsWindow.costume_preview_hint: Click the preview button to pin/close the preview; hold Shift and hover for a temporary preview.
SettingsWindow.custom_model_import_hint: Choose a folder containing a model.json, or a packaged .zip. Only Cubism 2.1 (model.json + .moc) is supported; Cubism 3/4 (.model3.json / .moc3) is not. Imported characters appear in the "Others" group.
SettingsWindow.custom_model_name_placeho: Used as display and folder name, e.g. My Character
SettingsWindow.custom_model_costume_plac: Defaults to 'default'; ignored when multiple costumes are found
SettingsWindow.custom_model_imported_con: Imported "{name}" with {count} costume(s). Find it in the "Others" group.
SettingsWindow.custom_model_delete_in_us: This character is currently used in the model list. Switch to another character there first, then delete it.
SettingsWindow.custom_model_delete_confi: Delete custom model "{name}"? This removes it from disk and cannot be undone.
SettingsWindow.custom_model_err_no_sourc: Please choose a model folder or .zip file first.
SettingsWindow.custom_model_err_invalid_: Invalid character name, please use a different one.
SettingsWindow.custom_model_err_name_exi: A character named "{name}" already exists, please use a different name.
SettingsWindow.custom_model_err_no_model: No model.json was found in the selected source.
SettingsWindow.custom_model_err_cubism3_: Detected a Cubism 3/4 model (.model3.json / .moc3), which is not supported. Please use a Cubism 2.1 model (model.json + .moc).
SettingsWindow.custom_model_err_missing_: model.json is missing a valid .moc model reference.
Missing a resource referenced by the model: {resource}
SettingsWindow.custom_model_err_source_m: The selected source does not exist or cannot be accessed.
SettingsWindow.custom_model_err_bad_zip: Could not read the .zip archive; the file may be corrupted.
SettingsWindow.custom_model_err_not_cust: This character is not a custom model and cannot be deleted.
SettingsWindow.model_list_keep_one_conte: Keep at least one character in the Live2D model list.
SettingsWindow.model_detail_subtitle: Select a model on the right, or change its character/costume.
SettingsWindow.model_detail_hint: Choose a new character or costume
SettingsWindow.live2d_idle_actions_hint: Global setting: when multiple Live2D models are on the desktop, all of them are affected together.
SettingsWindow.live2d_head_tracking_hint: Global setting: when disabled, the character will not follow the mouse cursor.
SettingsWindow.live2d_mutual_gaze_hint: When enabled, characters will look at the nearest character.
SettingsWindow.behavior_subtitle: Configure idle motions, gaze tracking, and multi-character interactions.
SettingsWindow.behavior_apply_hint: These options are saved globally; click Apply on the right to refresh the current pet.
SettingsWindow.click_motion_hint: Choose motion/expression per click area; Auto picks by region.
SettingsWindow.click_motion_import_empty: No click motion feedback profiles were found in this file.
SettingsWindow.click_motion_import_confi: Import {count} profile(s) using “{scope}” and overwrite matching click motion feedback settings?
SettingsWindow.click_motion_import_no_ma: The imported profiles did not match any model in the selected scope.
SettingsWindow.llm_subtitle: Configure the AI chat backend (OpenAI-compatible API)
SettingsWindow.llm_capability_hint: Tip: image understanding, web search, MCP, and Computer Use only take effect when the current model supports multimodal input or tool calling.
SettingsWindow.llm_api_url_hint: Tip: OpenAI-compatible APIs usually include /v1/chat/completions. For Google AI Studio, use https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com/v1beta/openai/chat/completions.
SettingsWindow.llm_aux_model_id_placehol: Optional fast model for planning and quick translation; blank = primary model
SettingsWindow.llm_aux_api_url_placehold: Leave blank to reuse primary model API URL
SettingsWindow.llm_aux_api_key_placehold: Leave blank to reuse primary model API Key
SettingsWindow.llm_custom_system_prompt_: Turn off the switch to temporarily disable this while keeping the content. This content is placed before the character settings in every chat request.
This instruction has higher priority than character profiles, long-term memory, and chat history. Use it for global behavior rules, and avoid conflicts with character identity or action tags.
SettingsWindow.llm_api_url_hint_chat_too: Remember to end the API address with /v1/chat/completions; Google AI Studio uses /v1beta/openai/chat/completions. Chat Completions-compatible APIs can also use tools through tool_calls/function calling. Configure web search, local MCP proxy tools, and Computer Use in Tools & Computer Control.
SettingsWindow.llm_api_url_hint_response: Responses mode can use https://api.openai.com/v1/responses. Official OpenAI can use native tools; configure MCP/Computer options in Tools & Computer Control.
This provider does not support OpenAI Responses. The app will use compatible Chat Completions at runtime; web search, MCP, and Computer Use go through tool_calls/function calling.
SettingsWindow.llm_chat_commands_hint: @stop / @停止 / @中断: force-stop the current model output. Affection, memory, and relationship commands are documented in Affection / Memory.
SettingsWindow.llm_chat_commands_cot: @cot [on/off]: quickly toggle reasoning display; omit the argument to flip the current state.
SettingsWindow.llm_chat_commands_websear: @websearch [on/off]: quickly toggle web search; omit the argument to flip the current state.
SettingsWindow.llm_chat_commands_sys_ins: @sys-instruction [on/off]: toggle the highest-priority system prompt preset; omit the argument to flip the current state.
SettingsWindow.llm_missing_config_conten: Please fill in all fields before testing.
SettingsWindow.llm_missing_api_content: Please fill in API URL and API Key first.
SettingsWindow.compact_window_subtitle: Configure the desktop floating chat window visibility, colors, and opacity.
SettingsWindow.ai_event_overlay_hint: When enabled, Codex, scripts, or other local tools can use bandori_ai_event.py to show thinking, tool use, streaming output, and completion status above the character.
SettingsWindow.ai_status_token_placehold: Optional; recommended when used by third-party apps
SettingsWindow.ai_status_port_hint: When enabled, listens on 127.0.0.1 and accepts JSON events at POST /ai-events. If Token is set, send Authorization: Bearer <token> or X-Bandori-Token.
SettingsWindow.compact_window_font_hint: Recommended: 10-18px. Very small or large fonts may make wrapping, button sizing, and animation feel off.
SettingsWindow.compact_commands_hint: @clear: clear the floating output; @stop / @停止 / @中断: stop the current floating reply.
SettingsWindow.chat_integration_subtitle: Receive messages from external chat apps or scripts, save them as local context, and show unread summaries above the pet.
SettingsWindow.chat_integration_overlay_: Show floating summaries for new messages
SettingsWindow.chat_integration_include_: Allow the model to read recent external chat context
SettingsWindow.chat_integration_hint: When enabled, listens on 127.0.0.1 and accepts JSON, form data, plain text, or URL query parameters. Messages are saved locally; when context is enabled, the next character chat can see recent messages.
SettingsWindow.chat_integration_apply_hi: After saving, the running pet is notified to refresh the port. If the pet is not running, start it before testing.
SettingsWindow.chat_integration_token_ge: Save the settings, then paste this Token into your chat app or relay plugin.
SettingsWindow.chat_integration_token_em: The Token field is empty. Click Generate Token first if you want one.
SettingsWindow.chat_integration_setup_co: Setup info copied. Paste it into your chat app Webhook/HTTP settings.
SettingsWindow.chat_integration_test_suc: BandoriPet received the test message. Floating summaries and context integration are available.
SettingsWindow.chat_integration_test_fai: Could not reach the local integration port. Make sure the pet is running and the chat integration settings are saved/applied. Error: {error}
SettingsWindow.napcat_desc: Connect to NapCat actively, like AstrBot. First enable the WebSocket server in the NapCat WebUI, then fill in the address below.
SettingsWindow.napcat_auto_reply_enabled: Enable auto-reply (AI generates and sends back to QQ)
SettingsWindow.napcat_reply_group_at_onl: Reply in groups only when the bot is @mentioned
SettingsWindow.napcat_test_empty_content: Please enter the NapCat WebSocket address first.
SettingsWindow.napcat_test_success_conte: Successfully connected to the NapCat WebSocket server.
SettingsWindow.napcat_test_failed_conten: Could not connect to NapCat. Make sure the WebSocket server is enabled in NapCat and the address and Token are correct. {error}
SettingsWindow.mcp_computer_subtitle: Supports provider-native MCP and Chat Completions tool_calls/function calling, converting MCP and Computer Use into compatible tools.
SettingsWindow.mcp_capability_hint: Tip: enabling MCP or Computer Use only makes tools available to the model. Tool use requires a model that supports tool_calls/function calling, and screenshot understanding also requires multimodal input support.
SettingsWindow.computer_use_risk_text: Computer Use sends screenshots to the model and can move the mouse, click, type text, or press shortcuts with your permission. Enable it only for trusted tasks; do not let the model access passwords, payments, deletions, purchases, posts, or other irreversible actions.
SettingsWindow.llm_hide_tool_call_detail: Hide Tool Details in Immersive Mode
When enabled, the model is instructed not to mention MCP, tool calls, function calling, Computer Use, or other implementation details in character replies.
SettingsWindow.llm_mcp_use_native: Prefer Native MCP for OpenAI Responses
SettingsWindow.llm_mcp_use_native_hint: Native MCP only works with providers that support it. DeepSeek, OpenRouter, and similar compatible APIs use local MCP proxy tools.
SettingsWindow.llm_mcp_servers_hint: This is plain-text JSON and only character content is read. Supports stdio, local/remote HTTP proxy, and OpenAI Responses native/server_url configs.
SettingsWindow.computer_use_auto_detect: Let the model decide from natural-language intent
SettingsWindow.computer_use_send_screens: Send post-action screenshots to the model
SettingsWindow.computer_use_allow_mouse: Allow mouse move, click, and scroll
SettingsWindow.computer_use_hint: DeepSeek/OpenRouter-compatible APIs use these capabilities through tool_calls/function calling. The model needs image input support to understand screenshots reliably; mouse tools map screenshot coordinates to real desktop coordinates.
SettingsWindow.mcp_json_must_be_list: MCP server config must be an array.
SettingsWindow.mcp_json_copied_content: MCP JSON was copied as plain text.
SettingsWindow.mcp_test_disabled_content: Turn on Enable MCP Tools before testing.
SettingsWindow.mcp_test_empty_content: No enabled servers were found in the MCP server JSON.
SettingsWindow.mcp_saved_content: The new tool configuration will take effect on the next chat request.
McpBridge.no_enabled_servers: No enabled MCP servers were found.
McpBridge.warn_native_connector: [WARN] {label}: connector_id native MCP can only be verified by the provider at request time.
McpBridge.warn_native_missing_url: [WARN] {label}: native MCP has no server URL or connector_id.
McpBridge.warn_provider_verification_cou: [WARN] {count} native connector item(s) require provider-side verification.
McpBridge.process_start_hint: MCP server process could not be started.
McpBridge.windows_node_hint: On Windows, install Node.js/npm and restart the app; if needed, set command to npx.cmd/npm.cmd or the full .cmd path.
McpBridge.http_url_empty: HTTP MCP server url is empty.
McpBridge.http_empty_event_stream: HTTP MCP server returned an empty event stream.
McpBridge.stdio_cwd_missing: stdio MCP cwd does not exist: {cwd}
McpBridge.process_not_running: MCP server process is not running.
McpBridge.missing_content_length: MCP server response is missing Content-Length.
SettingsWindow.compact_window_apply_hint: After saving, click Apply on the right to update the current pet.
SettingsWindow.chat_data_hint: Export backs up the SQLite database. Import replaces chat history; close chat windows first.
SettingsWindow.chat_data_export_content: Exported {conversations} conversation(s), {messages} direct message(s), and {group_messages} group message(s).
SettingsWindow.chat_data_import_confirm_: Import will replace the current chat history. Close chat windows first. Continue?
SettingsWindow.chat_data_import_content: Imported {conversations} conversation(s), {messages} direct message(s), and {group_messages} group message(s). Reopen chat windows for the change to take effect.
SettingsWindow.pov_custom_prompt_placeho: Example: Longtime Roselia fan; direct, respectful tone.
SettingsWindow.pov_persona_empty_content: Fill in Who I Am first.
SettingsWindow.pov_persona_saved_content: Current Who I Am was saved as a custom persona.
SettingsWindow.pov_hint: Saved POV is appended to the System Prompt. Character POV is stored as a separate long-term relationship target.
SettingsWindow.relationship_guide_subtit: These values are not win conditions. They are long-term background state used to adjust tone, distance, and memory usage.
SettingsWindow.relationship_guide_affect: How close the character feels to the current interaction target. 0-24 is tense, 25-39 distant, 40-54 normal, 55-69 familiar, 70-84 close, and 85-100 very close. It affects warmth, while still preserving the character's boundaries.
SettingsWindow.relationship_guide_trust_: Whether the character is willing to believe, rely on, or seriously receive what you say. Thanks, apologies, honest requests for help, and steady support usually raise trust; hostile wording lowers it.
SettingsWindow.relationship_guide_famili: Shared time and interaction history. Normal chatting gradually increases familiarity. Think of it as how long you have known each other, not the same thing as affection or trust.
SettingsWindow.relationship_guide_mood_b: The short-term emotion after recent interaction. It affects the next replies, but is not a long-term judgment. A character can trust you while still feeling worried, shy, or annoyed right now.
SettingsWindow.relationship_guide_memory: Memories store user profile details, preferences, relationship notes, and manual records the character should remember. Edit them here, or use chat commands such as @remember, @forget, and @status. Pick "User preferences (Global)" in the character dropdown to view and maintain the preference profile shared across every character, which is applied automatically when you start a new chat.
SettingsWindow.relationship_guide_pov_bo: When Character POV is enabled, the played character is stored as a separate relationship target, for example Character POV: Kasumi, instead of sharing the default user's state. This keeps real-user affection and roleplay relationship state from mixing.
SettingsWindow.relationship_guide_comman: In chat, use @affection 80, @trust 70, @familiarity 60, or @setmood 75 to set values directly. This is best for save migration, correcting a misread, or debugging relationship state.
SettingsWindow.memory_subtitle: View each character's long-term relationship with you and edit what they remember about you.
SettingsWindow.memory_global_profile: User preferences (Global · applies to all characters)
SettingsWindow.memory_global_hint: Global user preferences organize your long-term info (nickname, likes, boundaries, etc.) and are provided automatically whenever you start a new chat with any character, so the AI gets to know you faster.
SettingsWindow.memory_editor_hint: Pick a memory to edit, or add user profile details, preferences, and notes for this character to remember.
SettingsWindow.memory_content_placeholde: Example: User asked me to remember: likes Roselia lives, goes by Alex, birthday is May 18.
SettingsWindow.memory_empty_content: Fill in the memory content first.
SettingsWindow.memory_delete_confirm_con: This long-term memory will no longer be included in chat context. Continue?
SettingsWindow.memory_command_memory: @memory: view your global preferences and this character's specific memories.
SettingsWindow.memory_command_status: @status: view this character's affection, trust, familiarity, and current mood.
SettingsWindow.memory_command_remember: @remember <text>: have the current character remember a note long-term; in group chat it is saved for every character present.
SettingsWindow.memory_command_forget: @forget <keyword>: delete this character's memories that contain the keyword.
SettingsWindow.memory_command_mood: @setmood <value>: set current mood (0-100, higher is happier).
SettingsWindow.tts_subtitle: Configure speech synthesis for chat replies and reminder playback, reference audio, and translation for non-Chinese TTS.
SettingsWindow.tts_translate_to_selected: Translate to selected language with auxiliary model for non-Chinese TTS
SettingsWindow.tts_test_text_placeholder: Leave blank to use the default test text.
SettingsWindow.tts_test_default_text: Hello, this is a TTS test voice.
SettingsWindow.tts_test_unavailable_cont: Missing TTS playback dependencies. Unable to test.
SettingsWindow.tts_test_missing_referenc: Please select a reference audio character first, or ensure the current model character has a corresponding reference audio.
SettingsWindow.tts_test_empty_content: The TTS request completed but returned no playable audio.
SettingsWindow.display_subtitle: Tune Live2D rendering, refresh rate, V-Sync, model scale, opacity, and dark mode in one place.
SettingsWindow.quality_detail_performanc: Uses nearest texture filtering for integrated GPUs, remote desktops, or many pets at once.
SettingsWindow.quality_detail_balanced: Uses linear texture filtering for a good mix of clarity and smoothness.
SettingsWindow.preview_failed_content: Live2D costume preview failed to initialize: {error}
SettingsWindow.about_subtitle: A Live2D desktop pet for keeping BanG Dream! characters on your desktop.
SettingsWindow.about_desc: BandoriPet is an open-source desktop pet built with Live2D Cubism SDK and PySide6. It supports Live2D rendering, desktop dragging, system tray controls, multiple characters, pixel pets, and LLM roleplay chat.
SettingsWindow.about_license: This project's source code is released under GPLv3. You may use, study, modify, and distribute the code, and distributed modified versions should also follow GPLv3's open-source requirements.
SettingsWindow.about_disclaimer: Disclaimer: This project is for learning and non-commercial exchange only. Character models, textures, motions, and other assets belong to their original authors and rights holders.
SettingsWindow.about_tech: Tech stack: PySide6, PyQt-Fluent-Widgets, Live2D Cubism, Live2D-v2-Lua, and PyOpenGL.
SettingsWindow.update_hint: Check for updates to choose the right upgrade path for the current install type.
SettingsWindow.update_none: You are on the latest version.
SettingsWindow.update_confirm_content: BandoriPet may close and restart during the update. Continue?
SettingsWindow.side_chat_window_normal_t: Use a normal system window for chat so it appears in the taskbar and uses the OS minimize, maximize, and close controls.
SettingsWindow.auto_start_unsupported: Auto start cannot be configured automatically on this system yet.
SettingsWindow.auto_start_failed_content: Could not update the auto-start setting: {error}
SettingsWindow.launch_missing_model_cont: Choose a character and costume before the first launch.
SettingsWindow.wizard_subtitle: Set up model resources, choose a character outfit, and optionally configure AI/TTS before launching.
SettingsWindow.wizard_models_subtitle: First, make sure the Live2D model resources are in the right place.
SettingsWindow.wizard_models_place_conte: After downloading the model package, extract it first, then place the character .zst archives or character folders directly inside the project's models folder.
SettingsWindow.wizard_models_wrong_path: Common mistake: project/models/models/character.zst. If this is detected, use the organize button below.
SettingsWindow.wizard_ai_subtitle: You can skip these now and adjust them later in settings.
SettingsWindow.wizard_models_missing_con: Download and extract the model resources, then make sure character files are directly inside the models folder.
SettingsWindow.wizard_models_ready_conte: You can continue to choose a character and outfit.
SettingsWindow.wizard_models_ready_detai: {count} usable character/outfit models were detected. You can continue.
SettingsWindow.wizard_models_missing_det: Place the extracted character .zst archives or character folders here: {path}
SettingsWindow.wizard_models_nested_dete: {count} files/folders were found under models/models, which usually means the models folder was nested one level too deep.
SettingsWindow.wizard_models_nested_clea: No models/models nested folder was detected.
ModelResources.missing_content:
The models folder was not found. Please download and extract the model resources first.
Click OK to open the download link in your default browser.
LLMErrorHint.api_key: Error hint (API Key issue): The API key may be invalid, expired, or missing permission. Check that the API key in settings is correct and that the provider account is available.
LLMErrorHint.model_not_found: Error hint (Model not found): The model ID may not exist, or this endpoint may not support it. Check that the model ID matches the provider dashboard or model list.
LLMErrorHint.network: Error hint (Network failure): The request could not reach the model service. Check the API URL, network connection, proxy settings, or try again later.
LLMErrorHint.quota: Error hint (Insufficient quota): The account balance, free quota, or usage limit may be exhausted. Check the provider balance, billing status, or quota limits.
LLMErrorHint.unknown: Error hint: The exact cause is unclear. Use the original error above to check the API key, model ID, API URL, and provider status.
ChatWindow.title: Chat - {name}
ChatWindow.subtitle: AI chat | Enter to send, Shift+Enter for newline
ChatWindow.vision_fallback_empty: The fast vision model did not return an image observation.
ChatWindow.vision_fallback_failed: Fast vision model failed to read the image: {error}
ChatWindow.attach_pending: {count} image(s) attached. They will be sent to the model.
ChatWindow.chat_list_hint: Quickly switch private and group chats; right-click to manage names, avatars, and pins.
ChatWindow.rename_group_label: Enter a group display name, or leave it empty to restore the default:
ChatWindow.rename_private_label: Enter a chat display name, or leave it empty to restore the character name:
ChatWindow.no_llm_config: Please configure LLM API settings first.
ChatWindow.memory_remember_hint: What do you want me to remember? Type @remember [content].
ChatWindow.memory_forget_hint: Which memory do you want to forget? Type @forget [keyword].
ChatWindow.set_mood_hint: Please enter a mood value 0-100. Example: @setmood 75 (higher = better mood)
ChatCommand.toggle_bad_arg: Unrecognized switch value. Use on/off. Current {label}: {state}.
ChatCommand.sys_instruction_empty: (Note: the highest-priority system prompt is empty; fill it in Settings for it to take effect.)
ChatCommand.clock_usage: Usage: @clock 0930 [description] (four-digit 24h time, no colon; within the next 24h only).
ChatCommand.clock_failed: Could not create the clock; please check the time format.
ChatCommand.clock_range: Only clocks within the next 24 hours can be added.
ChatCommand.clock_added: Added a clock for {character}: {time}, next ring {next_at}, note: {desc}.
ChatCommand.clock_added_no_desc: Added a clock for {character}: {time}, next ring {next_at}. {character} will generate a personalized reminder then.
ChatCommand.pomodoro_added: Started a Pomodoro for {character}: {count} focus cycle(s), note: {desc}.
ChatCommand.pomodoro_added_no_desc: Started a Pomodoro for {character}: {count} focus cycle(s). {character} will generate a personalized reminder for each phase.
Relationship.status_global_label: ── Global User Preferences (apply to all characters) ──
Relationship.context_instruction: These are long-term interaction records saved by the app. Treat them as background context; only reference them when naturally relevant, do not recite them unprompted.
Relationship.context_global_label: User profile (cross-character long-term preferences, applies to every character):
Relationship.context_memories_empty: Long-term Memories: no clear records yet.
Relationship.context_instruction_footer: Interaction guideline: Adjust tone familiarity based on affection, trust, and mood changes, but always stay within the character's personality boundaries.
Reminder.llm_instruction: You are generating a reminder for a desktop pet app. Stay strictly in character, incorporating affection, long-term memory, the current reminder description and phase. Output only 1-2 short sentences in the user's language, do not explain the setup process, do not use Markdown. You may append one suitable action tag at the end.
SettingsWindow.reminder_subtitle: Set character-powered alarms and 25+5 pomodoro timers. Reminder text is generated from character affection, long-term memory, and your description.
SettingsWindow.reminder_saved_content: Alarm and pomodoro schedules have been updated.
SettingsWindow.alarm_command_hint: In chat, type @clock 0730 [description] (four-digit time, 0730 means 7:30 AM) to quickly add a clock within the next 24h; by default the first character on the Live2D stage generates a personalized reminder.
SettingsWindow.alarm_description_placeho: e.g. Wake up, drink water, meeting
SettingsWindow.alarm_repeat_empty_conten: Custom repeat needs at least one selected day.
SettingsWindow.alarm_added_content: The selected character will generate a reminder when it is time.
SettingsWindow.pomodoro_command_hint: In chat, type @pomodoro [cycles] [description] to quickly start a Pomodoro; by default the first character on the Live2D stage generates a personalized reminder.
SettingsWindow.pomodoro_repeat_hint: Each round is 25 minutes of focus + 5 minutes of rest; after every 4 focus rounds, it automatically enters a 15-minute long break.
SettingsWindow.data_management_subtitle: Import or export settings by category; full migration packs everything into one JSON file.
SettingsWindow.data_category_live2d_desc: All characters, costumes, and custom motions currently on display.
SettingsWindow.data_category_click_profi: Saved custom click motion feedback presets; system built-in presets are excluded.
SettingsWindow.data_category_llm_desc: Custom LLM settings; excludes built-in presets and API keys.
SettingsWindow.data_category_tts_desc: TTS toggle, endpoint, language, reference voice, and generation parameters.
SettingsWindow.data_category_pov_desc: POV mode, custom prompts, roleplay targets, and saved personas.
SettingsWindow.data_category_relationshi: Character relationship states and long-term memories.
SettingsWindow.data_category_reminders_d: Alarms, pomodoro timers, and reminder display mode.
SettingsWindow.data_category_compact_des: Floating window, status port, colors, opacity, and font.
SettingsWindow.data_category_chat_desc: External chat integration port, context, and token.
SettingsWindow.data_category_mcp_desc: MCP servers and computer control permissions.
SettingsWindow.data_category_misc_desc: Quality, refresh rate, V-Sync, topmost, auto-start, opacity, theme, language, etc.
SettingsWindow.data_category_all_desc: Export all of the above for migrating to another BandoriPet.
SettingsWindow.data_note_llm_keys: LLM API keys are not exported and will not be overwritten by import.
SettingsWindow.data_note_relationship: Affection and memory data will be merged into the local database.
SettingsWindow.click_motion_profile_name: Please enter a profile name first.
This name is reserved by a built-in preset. Please choose another name.
SettingsWindow.click_motion_profile_save: Current click motion feedback has been saved as a profile.
SettingsWindow.click_motion_applied_cont: Click motion feedback has been applied.
SettingsWindow.click_motion_profile_pres: Automatically picks suitable actions based on click area
Classic tsundere: harsh words, shy heart
React with surprise to all touches
Play a random motion on each click
